General.Name: Kerry Properties Ltd
General.Description: Kerry Properties Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the development, investment, management, and trading of properties in Hong Kong, Mainland China, and the Asia Pacific region. The company owns and operates hotels; and provides integrated logistics and international freight forwarding, consultancy, administrative support, project management, financial, estate agency, and construction services. It is also involved in the warehouse operations, as well as operation of restaurants, recreation parks, and ice rinks. The company was founded in 1978 and is based in Quarry Bay, Hong Kong. Kerry Properties Limited operates as a subsidiary of Kerry Group Limited.
General.Address: 25/F, Kerry Centre, Quarry Bay, Hong Kong
